verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus saves, he still does He'll make of you someone new Cleanse the sin that was The holy spirit whispers No more must you be enslaved Just believe it, Jesus saves.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We talk of heaven's beauty and that's good We talk of loving others and we should But to a dying world the greatest thing that we can say Is take a look at calvary, Jesus saves

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We have heard a joyful sound Jesus saves, Jesus saves Spread the tidings all around Jesus saves, Jesus saves
